tasks.title: Set Up Monitor Mode
tasks.description: Configure your USB wireless adapter for monitor mode and test injection.

tasks.title: Capture a WPA2 Handshake
tasks.description: Use airodump-ng and aireplay-ng to capture a 4-Way Handshake from your lab router.

tasks.title: Crack the Handshake
tasks.description: Use aircrack-ng and Hashcat to crack the captured handshake.

tasks.title: Evil Twin Simulation
tasks.description: Use Airgeddon to create a rogue AP and capture credentials (lab only).
